ResourceHeader.ResourceName: IBEX High Energy Neutral Atom Imager (Hi) Data Release 04, H3 ENA Deflection Correction Tables in the Spacecraft Frame, 7.5-day Cadence

RevisionEvent.Note: Initial release of metadata, ADAPT generated, LFB
Curated and validated against SPASE 2.7.1, OK

ResourceHeader.Description:
The Interstellar Boundary Explorer (IBEX) High Energy Neutral Atom Imager (IBEX-Hi) Data Release 04 H3 transport products provide 7.5-day cadence tables for energetic neutral atom transport 
        through the heliosphere for the 2009-2012 observing interval. These products include survival probability, angular deflection, and energy loss or gain correction tables, supplied in both the spacecraft frame (SCF) 
        and the inertial frame at 1 AU. The tables are organized by orbit or half-orbit interval, solar ecliptic longitude or angle bin, and energy channel or energy grid, depending on the frame and product type. 
        The transport quantities support interpretation and correction of IBEX-Hi energetic neutral atom observations by characterizing the effects of heliospheric propagation between the termination shock and the observer.
        McComas, D. J., et al. (2017), Seven Years of Imaging the Global Heliosphere with IBEX, Astrophys. J. Supp. Ser., 229(2), 41 (32 pp.),
        http://doi.org/10.3847/1538-4365/aa66d8
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the IBEX Mission Principal Investigator, Dr. David J McComas of Princeton University. The IBEX Release 4 data are archived as fully citable data. Please consult IBEX team publications and personnel for further details on production, processing, and usage of these data.

Parameter.Name: Epoch Start Time
Parameter.Description: CDF epoch time for the start of the 7.5-day orbit or half-orbit interval.

Parameter.Name: Starting Orbit Number
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by using: Epoch
Parameter.Description: Starting orbit number of the 7.5-day measurement interval.

Parameter.Name: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude Bin Number
Parameter.Description: Solar West Ecliptic Longitude Bin Number corresponding to one-degree longitudinal increments of the current IBEX-HI viewing sector

Parameter.Name: Deflection
Parameter.Set: Time series defined by Epoch; dimension 1 is West_Longitude and dimension 2 is Energy_Channel.
